Video.summary: Mary Morrissey, with cameo appearances by Les Brown, David Meltzer, Bob Proctor and special guest, celebrity boxer and motivator, Sugar Ray Leonard
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Mary Morrissey

Video.summary: Shawn only wants folks who are willing to be honest about their struggles because it shows you can be fearless. Everyone deserves a happy life...but he can only help you if you're ready to take a chance on yourself. In this episode, the candidates have to sell themselves. They have to tell Shawn their story because he wants to know how you got stuck...but more importantly, they have to convince him they won’t give up...no matter how hard it is to hang on, or take a leap of faith.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Uncomfortable Positions

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Video.summary: Day one explores core teachings from A Course in Miracles: releasing ambition, ego, and grandiosity to become a compassionate presence. Rather than fixing or leading, we learn to hold space, trust divine guidance, and allow true healing and spiritual transmission to unfold.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers- Day 1

Video.summary: Day 2 of Teaching the Teachers explores the core teaching that only love is real and fear is illusion. Not a religion, the Course offers a non-dogmatic spiritual path that can complement other teachings and invites surrender to a higher power for true healing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 2

Video.summary: Day Three of Teaching the Teachers reveals that the ego conceals our perfect, God-created Self. We are not our bodies, and life continues beyond birth and death. Thoughts create effects, yet through atonement we can be freed from guilt, fear, and suffering when we choose healing.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 3

Video.summary: Day 1 introduces the practice of centering through the breath. When the mind drifts to regret or worry, we gently return—again and again. This meditation teaches concentration, presence, and compassion, reminding us that healing isn’t in never wandering, but in beginning again.
Video.title: Day 1 - Centering

Video.summary: Day 2 invites us to examine the stories we tell about our worth, limits, and lives. By recognizing conditioned habits and outdated coping tools, we reconnect with our power of choice. This lesson reminds us that change is always possible—and that we can meet life with renewed care and curiosity.
Video.title: Day 2 - Beginning Again

Video.summary: The science of falling in love, plus putting the spark back into your sex life. Also, there are some health benefits to “going commando” but there are some things you always must keep in mind.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Science of Falling in Love

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Science of Falling in Love
Sex Talk - The Science of Falling in Love
Sex Talk - The Science of Falling in Love

Video.summary: Does Marijuana increase or decrease your libido? And is pregnancy brain a real thing? Plus is it possible to overdose on ED medications and a look at just what happens during vaginal rejuvenation procedures?
Video.title: Sex Talk - Marijuana & Sex

Video.summary: Did you know anger can negatively affect your performance in the bedroom? And despite what you may have heard oral sex isn’t always safe sex? Plus, don’t think you can’t get pregnant just because you’re still breastfeeding.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Anger & Sex Don’t Mix

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Anger & Sex Don’t Mix
Sex Talk - Anger & Sex Don’t Mix
Sex Talk - Anger & Sex Don’t Mix

Video.summary: Dr Rev Michael Beckwith, with cameo appearances by John Assaraf, Sharon Lechter, Lisa Nichols, Shanda Sumpter, David Meltzer and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Dr Rev Michael Beckwith

Image.alt: World's Greatest Motivators - Dr Rev Michael Beckwith
World's Greatest Motivators - Dr Rev Michael Beckwith
World's Greatest Motivators - Dr Rev Michael Beckwith

Video.summary: Brian Tracy, with cameo appearance by Erik Swanson, interviewer.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - Brian Tracy

Video.summary: John Assaraf, with cameo appearances by with cameo appearances by David Meltzer, Cynthia Kersey, Blaine Bartlett, and emcee, Paisley Demby.
Video.title: World's Greatest Motivators - John Assaraf

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. James Greenblatt, a pioneer in the field of integrative medicine who has been treating patients with eating disorders for many decades. His nutritional approach to psychiatry is revolutionary and has helped patients worldwide. He is the author of seven books, including Answers to Anorexia and Finally Focused: The Breakthrough Natural Treatment Plan for ADHD.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry
The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry
The Aware Show: Dr. James Greenblatt --- Nutritional Solutions in Psychiatry

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Dr. Cari Schaefer, DACM, an expert in hormones who specializes in fertility and menopause. She is the best-selling author of the book, The Food Solution. As a healthcare expert and provider, educator, and lecturer, she is also the founder of Wise Woman Emerging, a platform designed to midwife women through the menopausal change. She is a Doctor of Traditional Chinese Medicine with more than 21 years of experience.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Dr. Cari Schaefer - Feel Better with Optimal Hormone Health

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Dr. Cari Schaefer - Feel Better with Optimal Hormone Health
The Aware Show: Dr. Cari Schaefer - Feel Better with Optimal Hormone Health
The Aware Show: Dr. Cari Schaefer - Feel Better with Optimal Hormone Health

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Rena Greenberg, a trained biofeedback therapist and renowned hypnotherapist, who developed Gastric Bypass Hypnosis, a method to transform the way patients think about food, by tapping into the power of the subconscious mind. She is the author of several books, including The Right Weigh and The Easy Sugar Break Up. Rena is passionate about helping others learn how to eat to live, not live to eat and she’s helped hundreds of people reach a healthier weight.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Rena Greenberg - Lose Weight Through Hypnosis

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Rena Greenberg - Lose Weight Through Hypnosis
The Aware Show: Rena Greenberg - Lose Weight Through Hypnosis
The Aware Show: Rena Greenberg - Lose Weight Through Hypnosis

Video.summary: We speak with experts about how to protect yourself from medical gaslighting, and other things you should know before you visit a doctor or dentist.
Video.title: Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It

Image.alt: Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It
Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It
Medical Gaslighting: How to Avoid It

Video.summary: Nutrition expert Dr. Thunder Jalili joins us to discuss why Americans spend more than $30 billion a year on dietary supplements, despite decades of research disputing their ability to improve health outcomes.
Video.title: The Truth About Vitamins

Video.summary: Dr. Robert Gabbay, chief scientific and medical officer of the American Diabetes Association, speaks with us about new preventative drugs and devices for diabetes patients, and how much progress has been made in the path towards a cure.
Video.title: Diabetes: The Path to a Cure

Image.alt: Diabetes: The Path to a Cure
Diabetes: The Path to a Cure
Diabetes: The Path to a Cure

Video.summary: Today's practice is an exploration of healing, the deep inner work that yoga opens you up to.
Video.title: Day 5: Healing Padangusthasana

Video.summary: Tune into the truth of who you are underneath the thoughts, using the breath and practice as a means of transformation into true self.
Video.title: Day 6: Breath Utkatasana

Video.summary: Today we explore awareness through breath, movement and the posture Virabhadrasana B.
Video.title: Day 7: Awareness Virabhadrasana B

Video.summary: Shawn Meaike's Millionaire Maker is a new series that shows you what you're really worth. Shawn is confident he could pluck anyone - no matter their background or experience - and turn them into a 7-figure earner...IF, they have the right attitude and drive. This series is about Shawn selecting who he will mentor and teach to reach a level of success they never thought possible. Welcome to the toughest job interview of your life. In this episode, Shawn meets the contestants and immediately finds out who's actually willing to fight for the life they want.
Video.title: Millionaire Maker - Fight or Flight

Video.summary: The longest moto ride of the trip awaits, after a grueling 20 day journey and coming down from Hemkund Sahib, we ride to Rishikesh, where the journey began. But nightfall might set in and cause troubles and challenges. As we know, challenges reveal who we are and the Ganga River serves up a challenge for our narrator Adam, as he learns a deep lesson foretold in episode one. Is the Ganga a mother?
Video.title: A Treacherous Ride Home

Video.summary: We finish at the Sacred Ganga River, where we began. The riders reflect on their journey and the idea of freedom has set in fully. It is our responsibility for choosing how we see the world. To embrace this power, It takes courage, discipline and strength. Something as Sacred as Freedom demands our totality. Thankfully, we are greater than we can imagine.
Video.title: We are Greater than we know.

Image.alt: We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.
We are Greater than we know.

Video.summary: Before Riding to the Hidden Valley of the Flowers, we get a rare view of the hidden life of the riders in this real world of yogis opening scene. This lightness contrasts a big incedent at the the following morning, setting the riders and Ryan up for some harsh truths about Power and passivity. True Power is yours to embrace. This is not a journey to feel better.
Video.title: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Image.alt: True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers
True Power in the Hidden Valley of the Flowers

Video.summary: A rare in off the cuff dialogue with Anand at breakfast about his father and the true meaning of abundance, wealth, sex, power, fame… Then an epic hike up to 15,000 feet and a temple dedicated to service and unity at Hemkund Sahib and its glacial lake. Here, Tiffany and Elle are served great reminders of the teacher within.
Video.title: Unity at Hemkund Sahib

Video.summary: Glenn and Amber have flipped over 1,000 houses and now they're looking for one lucky contestant to flip a house with. They are passionate about helping everyday people create wealth through real estate investing. So when casting call went out and submissions poured in. Watch as they look for the right partner to not only train but also to completely fund their first deal.
Video.title: A Winner Is Chosen

Video.summary: David and Alicia have won the contest, but the real game is about to begin. They have to find a house to flip, win Glenn and Amber's trust, and prove they can handle the pressures of house flipping. Because what David and Alicia don't know is that there's an even bigger test going on...Glenn and Amber are looking for more than a single flip, they want long-term investing partners they can fund. If these two newbies can get pull it off...they are about to get their Big Flipping Break!
Video.title: No House, No Flip

Video.summary: The team is feeling the pressure as a competitive real estate market threatens to kill the deal before they even get started. Glenn and Amber are starting to worry David and Alicia are in way over their heads.
Video.title: What's That Smell?

Video.summary: David and Alicia don't know they are being judged at every step by Glenn and Amber and the pressure is mounting. While looking for a General Contractor, questions about come up about how their managing the process. David and Alicia start taking demolition matters into their own hands.
Video.title: Surviving a Rollercoaster

Video.summary: The team confronts a problem that could make the entire profit of the job disappear. Watch as David and Alicia try to navigate a surprise visit from an environmental compliance agency.
Video.title: The Unwanted Houseguest

Video.summary: Glenn and Amber are in for a surprise of a lifetime and a contractor relationship goes sideways for Alicia and the team must recover fast.
Video.title: This House Is A Disaster

Video.summary: David works with Glenn to fix a messy permit issue that could cost thousands and cause weeks of work to be redone. The team is already well over budget and their general contractor problems finally come to a head.
Video.title: This Might've Been A Big Mistake

Image.alt: This Might've Been A Big Mistake
This Might've Been A Big Mistake
This Might've Been A Big Mistake

Video.summary: In the season finale, Alicia complete the staging of the house in hopes they can secure maximum profit. And the big question is finally revealed...will Glenn and Amber want to work with David and Alicia long-term, or just take their profits and move to the next deal.
Video.title: Deal Or No Deal
